intro: Gongylolepis cortesii, also known as Cortés' tree fern, is a species of fern within the family Blechnaceae. Research on G. cortesii has revealed potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for the treatment of various conditions such as fever and respiratory issues.
